---
title: "Dan Roth on New Frontiers of IE @ NAACL 2022"
description: "Dan Roth's NAACL 2022 IE tutorial close-out: 2 challenges, 6 directions, and a call to mitigate Information Pollution."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-07-10"
categories: [NLP, knowledge graphs, conference, NAACL]
image: cover.jpg
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![NAACL 2022 IE tutorial. Image from [Cognitive Computation Group, Penn](https://cogcomp.seas.upenn.edu/page/tutorial.202207/).](cover.jpg)

![Slide from Roth's talk at the [Cognitive Computation Group, Penn](https://cogcomp.seas.upenn.edu/page/tutorial.202207/).](02.jpg)

![Slide from Roth's talk at the [Cognitive Computation Group, Penn](https://cogcomp.seas.upenn.edu/page/tutorial.202207/).](03.jpg)

![Slide from Roth's talk at the [Cognitive Computation Group, Penn](https://cogcomp.seas.upenn.edu/page/tutorial.202207/).](04.jpg)
:::
Professor Dan Roth closed NAACL2022 tutorial on New Frontiers of Information Extraction with many insightful observations and suggestions:

* Challenge 1: Lack of Knowledge Reasoning
* Challenge 2: Unsolved "long-tail" problems

* Direction 1: Corpus-level IE
* Direction 2: Revisit Open-World IE
* Direction 3: Multimedia IE and Grounding
* Direction 4: Lifelong Learning IE
* Direction 5: Predicting the Future
* Direction 6: Apply Our Success to Social Good

With important call-out on mitigating Information Pollution: not just extracting factoids, but also mapping them to perspectives and explicating support relationships, to help us navigate through Information Pollution.

Can we fulfill those goals slated in 2042 before 2032?

Tutorial site: <https://cogcomp.seas.upenn.edu/page/tutorial.202207/>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_naacl2022-nlgpu-informationextraction-activity-6952029873959796736-wNof).*
